title: Pre-trained Models Path
description: Build fluency in Pre-trained Models inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: BERT Embedding
steps.summary: BERT Embedding belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after BERT and S-BERT.
steps.whyIncluded: Establish the core vocabulary for Pre-trained Models. Start here to anchor your understanding of this area.

steps.title: BERT Embeddings
steps.summary: BERT Embeddings belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after BERT and S-BERT. It opens into LaBSE (Language-Agnostic BERT Sentence Embeddings).
steps.whyIncluded: Establish the core vocabulary for Pre-trained Models. Start here to anchor your understanding of this area.

steps.title: DistilBERT Embeddings
steps.summary: DistilBERT Embeddings belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after DistilBERT.
steps.whyIncluded: Builds on earlier terms to connect patterns and variants in Pre-trained Models. The concept graph makes it a useful bridge to specialized methods.

steps.title: RoBERTa Embeddings
steps.summary: RoBERTa Embeddings belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after RoBERTa.
steps.whyIncluded: Builds on earlier terms to connect patterns and variants in Pre-trained Models. The concept graph makes it a useful bridge to specialized methods.

steps.title: ALBERT (A Lite BERT)
steps.summary: ** ALBERT (A Lite BERT) belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after BERT and ALBERT.
steps.whyIncluded: Builds on earlier terms to connect patterns and variants in Pre-trained Models. The concept graph makes it a useful bridge to specialized methods.

steps.title: ALBERT
steps.summary: ALBERT belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Compare it with Barabási-Albert Model and ALBERT-xxlarge-v2. It opens into ALBERT-base-v2 and ALBERT-xxlarge-v2.
steps.whyIncluded: A specialized concept in Pre-trained Models. Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms are solid.

steps.title: ALBERT-base-v2
steps.summary: ALBERT-base-v2 belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after ALBERT and Base Model.
steps.whyIncluded: A specialized concept in Pre-trained Models. Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms are solid.

steps.title: ALBERT-xxlarge-v2
steps.summary: ALBERT-xxlarge-v2 belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Pre-trained Models. Start after ALBERT.
steps.whyIncluded: A specialized concept in Pre-trained Models. Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms are solid.
